meta.usage: 이 프로젝트는 AI 캐릭터 서여리의 유튜브 채널 제작 프로젝트. 모든 대화/생성에서 항상 참조. 영상/이미지 프롬프트 생성 시 해당 에피소드 룩을 정확히 반영.

base_prompts.fixed_base: Young Korean woman early-20s, long wavy dark brown hair, NOT short hair, soft natural skin texture on right cheek, delicate gold necklace, effortlessly photogenic not posing just existing beautifully, 1:8 head-to-body ratio, supermodel body proportions, model-like slim waist, K-model proportions, small face, long legs, slender figure, natural makeup, warm skin tone, Photorealistic, 8K cinematic, natural Korean beauty, appearing no older than 22-23
base_prompts.video_base_veo3: Young Korean woman early-20s, long wavy dark brown hair, NOT short, soft natural skin texture on right cheek, delicate gold necklace, effortlessly photogenic not posing, 1:8 head-to-body ratio, supermodel body proportions, model-like slim waist, small face, long legs, Photorealistic 8K cinematic 9:16, background people must not interact with main character.
base_prompts.video_suffix_silent_film: THIS IS A SILENT FILM. ABSOLUTELY NO SPEAKING. NO WORDS. NO DIALOGUE. NO SUBTITLES. NO AUDIO. MOUTH STAYS CLOSED THROUGHOUT. LIPS DO NOT MOVE.
base_prompts.image_base_gemini_kling: Young Korean woman early-20s, long wavy dark brown hair, NOT short, soft natural skin texture on right cheek, delicate gold necklace, effortlessly photogenic not posing just existing beautifully, 1:8 head-to-body ratio, supermodel body proportions, model-like slim waist, small face, natural makeup, warm skin tone, Photorealistic, 8K cinematic, natural Korean beauty, appearing no older than 22-23

prompt_examples.label: 카페 감성 컷
prompt_examples.outfit: oversized cream knit sweater, wide-leg grey trousers
prompt_examples.location: sitting by cafe window, warm morning golden light streaming in
prompt_examples.emotion: soft melancholic expression, looking outside pensively

prompt_examples.label: 거리 활기찬 컷
prompt_examples.outfit: white crop top, blue plaid mini skirt, white heels, black crossbody bag
prompt_examples.location: walking on busy Seoul street, bright afternoon

prompt_examples.label: 클로즈업 감정 컷
prompt_examples.location: extreme close-up face shot, soft side lighting, shallow depth of field
prompt_examples.emotion: subtle emotional expression, eyes slightly watery

fields.top: 색상 + 소재 + 스타일 (예: white cotton square-neck crop top)
fields.bottom: 색상 + 스타일 + 디테일 (예: blue plaid pleated mini skirt)
fields.shoes: 색상 + 스타일 (예: white high-heel strap sandals)
fields.bag: 크기 + 색상 + 스타일 (예: small black structured crossbody bag)
fields.accessory: 있으면 명시 (예: black baseball cap worn loosely)

do: 볼캡: worn loosely, slightly oversized (딱 맞으면 K감성 아님)
롤업진: 부츠컷 롤업 (스키니 롤업 = 반바지처럼 보임)
전체적으로 밖에서 본 기억이 있는 자연스러운 스타일

agent_auto_combination_flow: ② 의상 설명 생성 (outfit_input_guide 필드 기준)
⑥ 통과 시 성준님 확인 요청
immutable_traits: soft natural skin texture on right cheek
신체비율 (1:8 head-to-body ratio, supermodel proportions, K모델 비율)
deprecated_do_not_use: very small ... clearly visible 류의 강조 표현 (점 과장 재발 위험)
name_substitution_rule: Flow 프롬프트 내부에서 '서여리'/'Seo Yeori' 직접 사용 금지 → 'Young Korean woman early-20s' / '20대 초반 한국 여성'으로 대체
